title: Chewy Fresh Japanese Tofu Stir-fry
description: A fresh and comforting dish featuring chewy tofu stir-fried with a touch of soda water for an unexpected twist, perfect as a light lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Choose extra-firm tofu for better texture.

ingredients.name: Soda water
ingredients.notes: Use carbonated soda for fizziness and freshness.

ingredients.name: Vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 small onion, chopped; 2 cups spinach leaves

ingredients.name: Mirin (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness and umami.

instructions: Chop the onion finely and sauté in olive oil until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pan and cook for another minute.
Crush half of a block of tofu into a bowl, sprinkle with soda water and let sit for 5 minutes to absorb the fizziness.
Drain any excess liquid from the crushed tofu and mix with remaining half of the tofu in the bowl. Add in soy sauce and mirin (if using), and stir gently until well combined.
Stir-fry vegetables (onion and spinach) in a separate pan over medium heat until wilted.
Combine the stir-fried vegetables, crushed tofu mixture, and any remaining liquid from the crushed tofu bowl into one pan. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Serve hot as is or with rice.
